rag_rules: Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in annex agree blocks when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided
Use component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
generic_rules: Declare helper booleans for range checks using pattern: eq name : bool = value >= lower and value <= upper
Ensure type alignment between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts
Use visible identifiers from the component scope for assumption and guarantee expressions
Structure AGREE annex blocks with proper opening and closing syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Boolean expressions in AGREE must use bool type for helper declarations
Component type annexes are preferred for structural assumptions and guarantees
anti_patterns: Avoid placing assumptions or guarantees in implementation annexes unless binding specific assignments
Do not mix types in boolean expressions without explicit declaration alignment
